$comment: Template MCP server config. Copy this file to .vscode/mcp.json and edit paths/env vars for your local environment. The .vscode/mcp.json file is gitignored so your local paths never leak to source control.

playwright.$comment: Playwright MCP — required by the Explorer for web/hybrid scenarios

appium-mcp.$comment: Appium MCP — required by the Explorer for mobile/mobile-hybrid scenarios. Requires: Appium server running on localhost:4723, ANDROID_HOME env var set, device connected via ADB.
